---
title: "Final_Analysis"
author: "Mayleen"
date: "2026-04-04"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# PanelMatch - No Interference
## Setup
For matching (just tot rev)
```{r, message = F}
library(data.table)
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(PanelMatch)
library(ggplot2)
library(writexl)
library(fastDummies)

df <- readRDS("county_long.rds")
df <- df |> 
      group_by(geoid_2010) |>
      mutate(CountyID = as.integer(cur_group_id())) |>
      ungroup()

# make sure these are numeric
df <- df |> mutate(across(all_of(c("bachelors_perc", "med_household_income_adj", "white_perc")), as.numeric)) 

# Add REGION dummy columns
df <- df |> dummy_cols(select_columns = c("REGION"), ignore_na = FALSE, remove_selected_columns = TRUE, remove_first_dummy = FALSE)

# These are the variables we will adjust for
adj_set <- c("bachelors_perc", "med_household_income_adj", "white_perc",  "total_population", "TOT_REV", "TOT_ASSET","TOT_EXP", "lat", "lng")

# Other variables
ntee_vars <- grep("^NTEEV2_", names(df), value = TRUE)
region_vars <- grep("^REGION_", names(df), value = TRUE)

df <- df |> dplyr::select(all_of(c(c("CountyID", "TAX_YEAR", "geoid_2010", "treat.FEMA"), adj_set, ntee_vars, region_vars)))

# 1859 is New York County
# df$treat.FEMA[((df$CountyID == 1859) & (df$TAX_YEAR == 2001))] <- NA

# Log transformations
# saveRDS(df |> filter(TOT_REV < 0 | TOT_ASSET < 0 | TOT_EXP < 0), "misc_analysis/no_intV2_negative.rds")
# df <- df |> mutate(TOT_REV = case_when(TOT_REV < 0 ~ 0,
#                                        .default = TOT_REV),
#                    TOT_ASSET = case_when(TOT_ASSET < 0 ~ 0,
#                                        .default = TOT_ASSET),
#                    TOT_EXP = case_when(TOT_EXP < 0 ~ 0,
#                                        .default = TOT_EXP))
# 
# df <- df |> mutate(TOT_REV = log1p(TOT_REV),
#                    TOT_ASSET = log1p(TOT_ASSET),
#                    TOT_EXP = log1p(TOT_EXP),
#                    med_household_income_adj = log1p(med_household_income_adj),
#                    total_population = log(total_population))

# Adding spatially varying coefficients
source("matches_helper.R")
df <- add_SVC(df, num_E_vec = 50)

# https://stackoverflow.com/questions/74815244/panelmatch-r-errors-please-convert-time-id-to-consecutive-integers-and-pleas
panel_df <- PanelData(panel.data = as.data.frame(df),
                      unit.id = "CountyID",
                      time.id = "TAX_YEAR",
                      treatment = "treat.FEMA",
                      outcome = "TOT_REV")
# rm(df)

# saveRDS(panel_df, "panel_data/no_int_panelV1.rds") # No SVC
# saveRDS(panel_df, "panel_data/no_int_panelV2.rds") # Yes SVC
# saveRDS(panel_df, "panel_data/no_int_panelV3.rds") # Yes SVC BUT NO LOG TRANSFORMS

# write.csv(df |> dplyr::select(TAX_YEAR, FEMA_threshADJ) |> unique(), "updated_threshold.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r}
sum(is.na(panel_df$treat.FEMA)) # county_FEMA_indicator <- 3.78 #2019

treatVarPlot <- DisplayTreatment(panel.data = panel_df, 
                                 color.of.treated = "#DC267F",
                                 color.of.untreated = "#648FFF",
                                 title = "Treatment Distribution Across Units and Time",
                                 xlab = "Tax Year", ylab = "County", 
                                 legend.position = "right",
                                 legend.labels = c("untreated", "treated"),
                                 hide.x.tick.label = TRUE, hide.y.tick.label = TRUE, 
                                 dense.plot = TRUE)

treatVarPlot
#ggsave("treatment_variation_plot.png", plot = treatVarPlot, width = 7.5, height = 10, units = "in")
```

## Matching Methods - Config 3, With SVC
```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(PanelMatch)
library(ggplot2)
library(writexl)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(khroma)
source("matches_helper.R")

# panel_df <- readRDS("panel_data/no_int_panelV2.rds")

# Set up the folder path and saved object names
L = 3 # lag, options: 1, 3, 5
folder_path_match <- "matches/with_svc/no_int_panelV2/config3/"
folder_path_balance <- "balances/with_svc/no_int_panelV2/config3/"
save_name <- paste0("Lag", L)

# Retrieve the PanelMatch objects
matches_list <- readRDS(paste0(folder_path_match, save_name, ".rds"))

# Retrieve the PanelBalance objects
balances_list <- readRDS(paste0(folder_path_balance, save_name, ".rds"))

# Make the balances for each lag easy to work with as a dataframe
bal_df <- lapply(balances_list, summary)
bal_df <- lapply(bal_df, as.data.frame)
bal_df <- lapply(bal_df, tibble::rownames_to_column, var = "time")

# Print information about matching and balances
# write.csv(as.data.frame(summary(matches_list$none)), "match_summary.csv")
summary(matches_list$none)
summary(matches_list$ps.match)
# summary(matches_list$CBPS.match)
# summary(matches_list$ps.weight)
# summary(matches_list$CBPS.weight)
# 
plot(matches_list$none)
```


Default Matching Weights Plots
```{r}
# plot(extract(matches_list$CBPS.weight), panel.data = panel_df)
```


Default Scatter Plots
```{r}
# plot(balances_list$none, type = "scatter", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = TRUE, 
#      main = "Standardized Mean Difference of Covariates (No Matching)")
# plot(balances_list$mahalanobis, type = "scatter", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = TRUE,
#      ylim = c(-0.01,.1), main = "Standardized Mean Difference of Covariates (PS Matching)")
plot(balances_list$ps.match, type = "scatter", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = TRUE,
     ylim = c(-0.01,.1), main = "Standardized Mean Difference of Covariates (PS Matching)")
# plot(balances_list$CBPS.match, type = "scatter", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = TRUE,
#      ylim = c(-0.01,.1), main = "Standardized Mean Difference of Covariates (CBPS Matching)")
# plot(balances_list$ps.weight, type = "scatter", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = TRUE,
#      ylim = c(-0.01,.1), main = "Standardized Mean Difference of Covariates (PS Weighting)")
plot(balances_list$CBPS.weight, type = "scatter", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = TRUE,
     ylim = c(-0.01,.1), main = "Standardized Mean Difference of Covariates (CBPS Weighting)")
```


Default Covariate Balance Plots
```{r}
# plot(balances_list$none, type = "panel", include.unrefined.panel = FALSE, legend = TRUE, main = "No Matching") 
# plot(balances_list$ps.match, type = "panel", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = FALSE, main = "PS Matching", main.unrefined = "PS Matching (unrefined)") 
# plot(balances_list$CBPS.match, type = "panel", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = FALSE, main = "CBPS Matching", main.unrefined = "CBPS Matching (unrefined)") 
# plot(balances_list$ps.weight, type = "panel", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = FALSE, main = "PS Weighting", main.unrefined = "PS Weighting (unrefined)") 
# plot(balances_list$CBPS.weight, type = "panel", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = FALSE, main = "CBPS Weighting", main.unrefined = "CBPS Weighting (unrefined)") 
```

My Covariate Balance Plots
```{r}
covs_to_check <- c("bachelors_perc", "med_household_income_adj", "white_perc",  "total_population", "TOT_REV", "TOT_ASSET", "TOT_EXP", "NTEEV2_ART", "NTEEV2_EDU", "NTEEV2_ENV", "NTEEV2_HEL", "NTEEV2_HMS", "NTEEV2_HOS", "NTEEV2_IFA", "NTEEV2_MMB", "NTEEV2_PSB", "NTEEV2_REL", "NTEEV2_UNI", "NTEEV2_UNU", "NTEEV2_NA", "REGION_MIDWEST", "REGION_NORTHEAST", "REGION_SOUTH", "REGION_WEST")

bal_none <- tidy_bal_df(bal_data = bal_df$none, covariates = paste0("m.out.",covs_to_check))
bal_ps.match <- tidy_bal_df(bal_data = bal_df$ps.match, covariates = paste0("m.out.",covs_to_check))
bal_cbps.match <- tidy_bal_df(bal_data = bal_df$CBPS.match, covariates = paste0("m.out.",covs_to_check))
bal_ps.weight <- tidy_bal_df(bal_data = bal_df$ps.weight, covariates = paste0("m.out.",covs_to_check))
bal_cbps.weight <- tidy_bal_df(bal_data = bal_df$CBPS.weight, covariates = paste0("m.out.",covs_to_check))
```

```{r}
ylims <- list("base" = c(-0.15, 0.05), "ntee" = c(-0.15, 0.05), "loc" = c(-0.15,0.15), "unrefined" = c(-0.15, 0.05), "all" = c(-0.15, 0.15))
p_none <- no_int_no_SVC_plots(bal_none,
                              match_method = "No Matching",
                              ylim_base = ylims[["base"]], 
                              ylim_ntee = ylims[["ntee"]],
                              ylim_loc = ylims[["loc"]],
                              ylim_all = ylims[["all"]],
                              include.unrefined.panel = FALSE)
p_ps.match <- no_int_no_SVC_plots(bal_ps.match, 
                                  match_method = "PS Matching",
                                  ylim_base = ylims[["base"]], 
                                  ylim_ntee = ylims[["ntee"]],
                                  ylim_loc = ylims[["loc"]],
                                  ylim_all = ylims[["all"]],
                                  ylim_unrefined = ylims[["unrefined"]],
                                  include.unrefined.panel = TRUE)
p_cbps.match <- no_int_no_SVC_plots(bal_cbps.match,
                                  match_method = "CBPS Matching",
                                  ylim_base = ylims[["base"]], 
                                  ylim_ntee = ylims[["ntee"]],
                                  ylim_loc = ylims[["loc"]],
                                  ylim_all = ylims[["all"]],
                                  include.unrefined.panel = FALSE)
p_ps.weight <- no_int_no_SVC_plots(bal_ps.weight,
                                  match_method = "PS Weighting",
                                  ylim_base = ylims[["base"]], 
                                  ylim_ntee = ylims[["ntee"]],
                                  ylim_loc = ylims[["loc"]],
                                  ylim_all = ylims[["all"]],
                                  include.unrefined.panel = FALSE)
p_cbps.weight <- no_int_no_SVC_plots(bal_cbps.weight,
                                  match_method = "CBPS Weighting",
                                  ylim_base = ylims[["base"]], 
                                  ylim_ntee = ylims[["ntee"]],
                                  ylim_loc = ylims[["loc"]],
                                  ylim_all = ylims[["all"]],
                                  include.unrefined.panel = FALSE)

options(repr.plot.width = 6, repr.plot.height = 4)

p_none$all
# p_ps.match$all_unrefined
p_ps.match$all
# p_cbps.match$all
# p_ps.weight$all
p_cbps.weight$all
# 
p_none$base
# p_ps.match$base_unrefined
p_ps.match$base
# p_cbps.match$base
# p_ps.weight$base
p_cbps.weight$base
# 
p_none$ntee
# p_ps.match$ntee_unrefined
p_ps.match$ntee
# p_cbps.match$ntee
# p_ps.weight$ntee
p_cbps.weight$ntee
# 
p_none$loc
# p_ps.match$loc_unrefined
p_ps.match$loc
# p_cbps.match$loc
# p_ps.weight$loc
p_cbps.weight$loc

```

```{r}
q_none <- quantile(signif(abs(bal_none$value[bal_none$unrefined == FALSE]), 3), probs = seq(0,1,0.1))
q_ps.mat <- quantile(signif(abs(bal_ps.match$value[bal_ps.match$unrefined == FALSE]), 3), probs = seq(0,1,0.1))
q_cbps.mat <- quantile(signif(abs(bal_cbps.match$value[bal_cbps.match$unrefined == FALSE]), 3), probs = seq(0,1,0.1))
q_ps.w <- quantile(signif(abs(bal_ps.weight$value[bal_ps.weight$unrefined == FALSE]), 3), probs = seq(0,1,0.1))
q_cbps.w <- quantile(signif(abs(bal_cbps.weight$value[bal_cbps.weight$unrefined == FALSE]), 3), probs = seq(0,1,0.1))

df <- cbind(as.data.frame(q_none), as.data.frame(q_ps.mat), as.data.frame(q_cbps.mat), as.data.frame(q_ps.w), as.data.frame(q_cbps.w))

df$winner <- colnames(df)[max.col(-df, ties.method = "first")]

write.csv(df, file = paste0(folder_path_balance, save_name, "deciles.csv"))

# write.csv(bal_none |> filter(unrefined == FALSE) |> select(-unrefined) |> 
#                 pivot_wider(names_from = covariate, values_from = value) |>
#                 mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, digits = 5))),
#           file = "balance.csv")
# 
# write.csv(bal_ps.match |> filter(unrefined == FALSE) |> select(-unrefined) |> 
#                 pivot_wider(names_from = covariate, values_from = value) |>
#                 mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, digits = 5))),
#           file = "balance.csv")
# 
# write.csv(bal_cbps.weight |> filter(unrefined == FALSE) |> select(-unrefined) |> 
#                 pivot_wider(names_from = covariate, values_from = value) |>
#                 mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, digits = 5))),
#           file = "balance.csv")
```

## Matching Methods - Config 4, With SVC
```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(PanelMatch)
library(ggplot2)
library(writexl)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(khroma)
source("matches_helper.R")

# panel_df <- readRDS("panel_data/no_int_panelV3.rds")

# Set up the folder path and saved object names
L = 3 # lag, options: 1, 3, 5
folder_path_match <- "matches/with_svc/no_int_panelV3/config4/"
folder_path_balance <- "balances/with_svc/no_int_panelV3/config4/"
save_name <- paste0("Lag", L)

# Retrieve the PanelMatch objects
matches_list <- readRDS(paste0(folder_path_match, save_name, ".rds"))

# Retrieve the PanelBalance objects
balances_list <- readRDS(paste0(folder_path_balance, save_name, ".rds"))

# Make the balances for each lag easy to work with as a dataframe
bal_df <- lapply(balances_list, summary)
bal_df <- lapply(bal_df, as.data.frame)
bal_df <- lapply(bal_df, tibble::rownames_to_column, var = "time")

# Print information about matching and balances
# write.csv(as.data.frame(summary(matches_list$none)), "match_summary.csv")
summary(matches_list$none)
summary(matches_list$ps.match)
# summary(matches_list$CBPS.match)
# summary(matches_list$ps.weight)
# summary(matches_list$CBPS.weight)
# 
plot(matches_list$none)
```


Default Matching Weights Plots
```{r}
# plot(extract(matches_list$CBPS.weight), panel.data = panel_df)
```


Default Scatter Plots
```{r}
# plot(balances_list$none, type = "scatter", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = TRUE, 
#      main = "Standardized Mean Difference of Covariates (No Matching)")
# plot(balances_list$mahalanobis, type = "scatter", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = TRUE,
#      ylim = c(-0.01,.1), main = "Standardized Mean Difference of Covariates (PS Matching)")
plot(balances_list$ps.match, type = "scatter", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = TRUE,
     ylim = c(-0.01,.1), main = "Standardized Mean Difference of Covariates (PS Matching)")
# plot(balances_list$CBPS.match, type = "scatter", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = TRUE,
#      ylim = c(-0.01,.1), main = "Standardized Mean Difference of Covariates (CBPS Matching)")
# plot(balances_list$ps.weight, type = "scatter", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = TRUE,
#      ylim = c(-0.01,.1), main = "Standardized Mean Difference of Covariates (PS Weighting)")
plot(balances_list$CBPS.weight, type = "scatter", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = TRUE,
     ylim = c(-0.01,.1), main = "Standardized Mean Difference of Covariates (CBPS Weighting)")
```


Default Covariate Balance Plots
```{r}
# plot(balances_list$none, type = "panel", include.unrefined.panel = FALSE, legend = TRUE, main = "No Matching") 
# plot(balances_list$ps.match, type = "panel", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = FALSE, main = "PS Matching", main.unrefined = "PS Matching (unrefined)") 
# plot(balances_list$CBPS.match, type = "panel", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = FALSE, main = "CBPS Matching", main.unrefined = "CBPS Matching (unrefined)") 
# plot(balances_list$ps.weight, type = "panel", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = FALSE, main = "PS Weighting", main.unrefined = "PS Weighting (unrefined)") 
# plot(balances_list$CBPS.weight, type = "panel", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = FALSE, main = "CBPS Weighting", main.unrefined = "CBPS Weighting (unrefined)") 
```

My Covariate Balance Plots
```{r}
covs_to_check <- c("bachelors_perc", "med_household_income_adj", "white_perc",  "total_population", "TOT_REV", "TOT_ASSET", "TOT_EXP", "NTEEV2_ART", "NTEEV2_EDU", "NTEEV2_ENV", "NTEEV2_HEL", "NTEEV2_HMS", "NTEEV2_HOS", "NTEEV2_IFA", "NTEEV2_MMB", "NTEEV2_PSB", "NTEEV2_REL", "NTEEV2_UNI", "NTEEV2_UNU", "NTEEV2_NA", "REGION_MIDWEST", "REGION_NORTHEAST", "REGION_SOUTH", "REGION_WEST")

bal_none <- tidy_bal_df(bal_data = bal_df$none, covariates = paste0("m.out.",covs_to_check))
bal_ps.match <- tidy_bal_df(bal_data = bal_df$ps.match, covariates = paste0("m.out.",covs_to_check))
bal_cbps.match <- tidy_bal_df(bal_data = bal_df$CBPS.match, covariates = paste0("m.out.",covs_to_check))
bal_ps.weight <- tidy_bal_df(bal_data = bal_df$ps.weight, covariates = paste0("m.out.",covs_to_check))
bal_cbps.weight <- tidy_bal_df(bal_data = bal_df$CBPS.weight, covariates = paste0("m.out.",covs_to_check))
```

```{r}
ylims <- list("base" = c(-0.15, 0.05), "ntee" = c(-0.15, 0.05), "loc" = c(-0.15,0.15), "unrefined" = c(-0.15, 0.05), "all" = c(-0.15, 0.15))
p_none <- no_int_no_SVC_plots(bal_none,
                              match_method = "No Matching",
                              ylim_base = ylims[["base"]], 
                              ylim_ntee = ylims[["ntee"]],
                              ylim_loc = ylims[["loc"]],
                              ylim_all = ylims[["all"]],
                              include.unrefined.panel = FALSE)
p_ps.match <- no_int_no_SVC_plots(bal_ps.match, 
                                  match_method = "PS Matching",
                                  ylim_base = ylims[["base"]], 
                                  ylim_ntee = ylims[["ntee"]],
                                  ylim_loc = ylims[["loc"]],
                                  ylim_all = ylims[["all"]],
                                  ylim_unrefined = ylims[["unrefined"]],
                                  include.unrefined.panel = TRUE)
p_cbps.match <- no_int_no_SVC_plots(bal_cbps.match,
                                  match_method = "CBPS Matching",
                                  ylim_base = ylims[["base"]], 
                                  ylim_ntee = ylims[["ntee"]],
                                  ylim_loc = ylims[["loc"]],
                                  ylim_all = ylims[["all"]],
                                  include.unrefined.panel = FALSE)
p_ps.weight <- no_int_no_SVC_plots(bal_ps.weight,
                                  match_method = "PS Weighting",
                                  ylim_base = ylims[["base"]], 
                                  ylim_ntee = ylims[["ntee"]],
                                  ylim_loc = ylims[["loc"]],
                                  ylim_all = ylims[["all"]],
                                  include.unrefined.panel = FALSE)
p_cbps.weight <- no_int_no_SVC_plots(bal_cbps.weight,
                                  match_method = "CBPS Weighting",
                                  ylim_base = ylims[["base"]], 
                                  ylim_ntee = ylims[["ntee"]],
                                  ylim_loc = ylims[["loc"]],
                                  ylim_all = ylims[["all"]],
                                  include.unrefined.panel = FALSE)

options(repr.plot.width = 6, repr.plot.height = 4)

p_none$all
# p_ps.match$all_unrefined
p_ps.match$all
# p_cbps.match$all
# p_ps.weight$all
# p_cbps.weight$all
# 
# p_none$base
# p_ps.match$base_unrefined
p_ps.match$base
# p_cbps.match$base
# p_ps.weight$base
# p_cbps.weight$base
# 
# p_none$ntee
# p_ps.match$ntee_unrefined
p_ps.match$ntee
# p_cbps.match$ntee
# p_ps.weight$ntee
# p_cbps.weight$ntee
# 
# p_none$loc
# p_ps.match$loc_unrefined
p_ps.match$loc
# p_cbps.match$loc
# p_ps.weight$loc
# p_cbps.weight$loc

```

```{r}
q_none <- quantile(signif(abs(bal_none$value[bal_none$unrefined == FALSE]), 3), probs = seq(0,1,0.1))
q_ps.mat <- quantile(signif(abs(bal_ps.match$value[bal_ps.match$unrefined == FALSE]), 3), probs = seq(0,1,0.1))
q_cbps.mat <- quantile(signif(abs(bal_cbps.match$value[bal_cbps.match$unrefined == FALSE]), 3), probs = seq(0,1,0.1))
q_ps.w <- quantile(signif(abs(bal_ps.weight$value[bal_ps.weight$unrefined == FALSE]), 3), probs = seq(0,1,0.1))
q_cbps.w <- quantile(signif(abs(bal_cbps.weight$value[bal_cbps.weight$unrefined == FALSE]), 3), probs = seq(0,1,0.1))

df <- cbind(as.data.frame(q_none), as.data.frame(q_ps.mat), as.data.frame(q_cbps.mat), as.data.frame(q_ps.w), as.data.frame(q_cbps.w))

df$winner <- colnames(df)[max.col(-df, ties.method = "first")]

write.csv(df, file = paste0(folder_path_balance, save_name, "deciles.csv"))

write.csv(bal_none |> filter(unrefined == FALSE) |> select(-unrefined) |>
                pivot_wider(names_from = covariate, values_from = value) |>
                mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, digits = 5))),
          file = "balance.csv")

write.csv(bal_ps.match |> filter(unrefined == FALSE) |> select(-unrefined) |>
                pivot_wider(names_from = covariate, values_from = value) |>
                mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, digits = 5))),
          file = "balance.csv")
# 
# write.csv(bal_cbps.weight |> filter(unrefined == FALSE) |> select(-unrefined) |> 
#                 pivot_wider(names_from = covariate, values_from = value) |>
#                 mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, digits = 5))),
#           file = "balance.csv")
```


## Estimates
### Config 3 versus Config 4 - No Stratification

```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(PanelMatch)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)

# Set up the folder path and saved object names
L = 3 # lag, options: 1, 3, 5
save_name <- paste0("Lag", L)

folder_pathC3 <- "matches/with_svc/no_int_panelV2/config3/"
folder_pathC4 <- "matches/with_svc/no_int_panelV3/config4/"

# Retrieve the PanelMatch objects
matches_listC3 <- readRDS(paste0(folder_pathC3, save_name, ".rds"))
matches_listC4 <- readRDS(paste0(folder_pathC4, save_name, ".rds"))

# Retrieve the PanelData object
panel_dfC3 <- readRDS("panel_data/no_int_panelV2.rds")
panel_dfC4 <- readRDS("panel_data/no_int_panelV3.rds")

estimates_save_nameC3 <- "estimates/with_svc_no_intV2_con3_"
estimates_save_nameC4 <- "estimates/with_svc_no_intV3_con4_"

# No Matching
m.out.noneC3 <- matches_listC3$none
m.out.noneC4 <- matches_listC4$none
# attr(m.out.none, "outcome") <- "EXP_LN_REV"
# attr(m.out.none, "outcome.var") <- "EXP_LN_REV"

match_methodC3 <- "ps.match"
match_methodC4 <- "ps.match"

m.out.C3 <- matches_listC3[[match_methodC3]]
m.out.C4 <- matches_listC4[[match_methodC4]]

# outcome_vars <- c("TOT_REV", "REV_ART", "REV_EDU", "REV_HMS", "REV_PSB", "REV_ENV", "REV_HEL", "REV_HOS", "REV_UNI", "REV_MMB", "REV_ENV") # REV_REL, REV_IFA, REV_UNU, REV_NA

# outcome_vars <- c("REV_SIZE.1", "REV_SIZE.2", "REV_SIZE.3", "REV_SIZE.4", "REV_SIZE.5", "REV_SIZE.6") # "REV_SIZE.NA"
outcome_vars <- c("TOT_REV")
```

```{r}
# Estimates under no matching
res_no.match.C3 <- PanelEstimate(sets = m.out.noneC3,
                     panel.data = panel_dfC3,
                     se.method = "bootstrap",
                     parallel = TRUE,
                     num.cores = 6,
                     number.iterations = 10000)

res_no.match.C4 <- PanelEstimate(sets = m.out.noneC4,
                     panel.data = panel_dfC4,
                     se.method = "bootstrap",
                     parallel = TRUE,
                     num.cores = 6,
                     number.iterations = 10000)

# Estimates under CBPS Weighting
res.C3 <- PanelEstimate(sets = m.out.C3,
                     panel.data = panel_dfC3,
                     se.method = "bootstrap",
                     parallel = TRUE,
                     num.cores = 6,
                     number.iterations = 10000)

res.C4 <- PanelEstimate(sets = m.out.C4,
                     panel.data = panel_dfC4,
                     se.method = "bootstrap",
                     parallel = TRUE,
                     num.cores = 6,
                     number.iterations = 10000)
```

```{r}
plot(res_no.match.C3, main = "Estimated Effects (LOG REV) - No Matching")
summary(res_no.match.C3)
hist(res_no.match.C3$bootstrapped.estimates) 
# as.data.frame(summary(res_no.match.C3)) |> mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ exp(.x)-1))

plot(res_no.match.C4, main = "Estimated Effects (REV) - No Matching")
summary(res_no.match.C4)
hist(res_no.match.C4$bootstrapped.estimates)

plot(res.C3, main = "Estimated Effects (LOG REV) - PS Matching")
summary(res.C3)
hist(res.C3$bootstrapped.estimates)

plot(res.C4, main = "Estimated Effects (REV) - PS Matching")
summary(res.C4)
hist(res.C4$bootstrapped.estimates)
```



### Config 3 versus Config 4 - With Stratification by SIZE
```{r, message = F}
library(data.table)
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(PanelMatch)
library(ggplot2)
library(writexl)
library(fastDummies)

df <- readRDS("county_long.rds")
df <- df |> 
      group_by(geoid_2010) |>
      mutate(CountyID = as.integer(cur_group_id())) |>
      ungroup()

# outcome_vars <- grep("^REV_", names(df), value = TRUE)
outcome_vars <- c("REV_SIZE.1", "REV_SIZE.2", "REV_SIZE.3", "REV_SIZE.4", "REV_SIZE.5", "REV_SIZE.6")

df <- df |> dplyr::select(all_of(c(c("CountyID", "TAX_YEAR"), outcome_vars))) 

panel_dfC4 <- readRDS("panel_data/no_int_panelV3.rds")
df <- merge(panel_dfC4, df, by = c("CountyID", "TAX_YEAR"))

df <- as.data.frame(df) |> select(all_of(c(c("CountyID", "TAX_YEAR", "TOT_REV", "treat.FEMA"), outcome_vars)))
panel_dfC4 <- PanelData(panel.data = df,
                      unit.id = "CountyID",
                      time.id = "TAX_YEAR",
                      treatment = "treat.FEMA",
                      outcome = "TOT_REV")

# Log transformations
panel_dfC3 <- panel_dfC4 |> mutate(across(all_of(outcome_vars), ~ if_else(.x < 0, 0, .x)))
panel_dfC3 <- panel_dfC3 |> mutate(across(all_of(outcome_vars), log1p))
rm(df)
```

```{r}
# Set up the folder path and saved object names
L = 3 # lag, options: 1, 3, 5
save_name <- paste0("Lag", L)

folder_pathC3 <- "matches/with_svc/no_int_panelV2/config3/"
folder_pathC4 <- "matches/with_svc/no_int_panelV3/config4/"

# Retrieve the PanelMatch objects
matches_listC3 <- readRDS(paste0(folder_pathC3, save_name, ".rds"))
matches_listC4 <- readRDS(paste0(folder_pathC4, save_name, ".rds"))

estimates_save_nameC3 <- "estimates/with_svc_no_intV2_con3_"
estimates_save_nameC4 <- "estimates/with_svc_no_intV3_con4_"

match_methodC3 <- "ps.match"
match_methodC4 <- "ps.match"

m.out.C3 <- matches_listC3[[match_methodC3]]
m.out.C4 <- matches_listC4[[match_methodC4]]

res.C3 <- list()
for (x in outcome_vars){
      print(x)
      attr(panel_dfC3, "outcome") <- x
      attr(m.out.C3, "outcome") <- x
      attr(m.out.C3, "outcome.var") <- x
      
      res.C3[[x]] <- PanelEstimate(sets = m.out.C3,
                     panel.data = panel_dfC3,
                     se.method = "bootstrap",
                     parallel = TRUE,
                     num.cores = 6,
                     number.iterations = 10000)
}

for (x in outcome_vars){
      file_name <- paste0("estimates/c3", x, ".png")
      print(file_name)
      png(file_name)
      plot(res.C3[[x]], main = paste0("Estimated Effects (LOG ", x, ") - ", match_methodC3))
      dev.off()
}

file_name <- paste0(estimates_save_nameC3, save_name, ".xlsx")
print(file_name)
estimate_summaries.C3 <- lapply(res.C3, summary)
estimate_summaries.C3 <- lapply(estimate_summaries.C3, as.data.frame)
write_xlsx(estimate_summaries.C3, file_name)

res.C4 <- list()
for (x in outcome_vars){
      print(x)
      attr(panel_dfC4, "outcome") <- x
      attr(m.out.C4, "outcome") <- x
      attr(m.out.C4, "outcome.var") <- x
      
      res.C4[[x]] <- PanelEstimate(sets = m.out.C4,
                     panel.data = panel_dfC4,
                     se.method = "bootstrap",
                     parallel = TRUE,
                     num.cores = 6,
                     number.iterations = 10000)
}

for (x in outcome_vars){
      file_name <- paste0("estimates/c4", x, ".png")
      print(file_name)
      png(file_name)
      plot(res.C4[[x]], main = paste0("Estimated Effects (", x, ") - ", match_methodC4))
      dev.off()
}

file_name <- paste0(estimates_save_nameC4, save_name, ".xlsx")
print(file_name)
estimate_summaries.C4 <- lapply(res.C4, summary)
estimate_summaries.C4 <- lapply(estimate_summaries.C4, as.data.frame)
write_xlsx(estimate_summaries.C4, file_name)
```

## Choosing the number of SVC
```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(fields)
library(MASS)

df <- readRDS("county_long.rds")
df <- df |> 
      group_by(geoid_2010) |>
      mutate(CountyID = as.integer(cur_group_id())) |>
      ungroup()

# These are some socioeconomic covariates we may evaluate balance for but need to convert from string to num
covs_to_check <- c("white_perc", "bachelors_perc", "poverty_perc", "unemployment", "med_family_income_adj", "med_household_income_adj", "total_population")
df <- df |> mutate(across(all_of(covs_to_check), as.numeric)) # make sure these are numeric

# These are the variables we will assess balance for
se_vars <- c("bachelors_perc", "med_household_income_adj", "white_perc",  "total_population")
other_vars <- c("TOT_REV", "TOT_ASSET")
ntee_vars <- c("NTEEV2_ART", "NTEEV2_EDU", "NTEEV2_ENV", "NTEEV2_HEL", "NTEEV2_HMS", "NTEEV2_HOS", "NTEEV2_IFA", "NTEEV2_MMB", "NTEEV2_PSB", "NTEEV2_REL", "NTEEV2_UNI", "NTEEV2_UNU", "NTEEV2_NA")

df <- df |> dplyr::select(all_of(c(c("CountyID", "TAX_YEAR", "geoid_2010", "treat.FEMA_nDis", "lat", "lng"), se_vars, other_vars, ntee_vars)))

df <- df |> mutate(TOT_REV = case_when(TOT_REV < 0 ~ 0,
                                       .default = TOT_REV),
                   TOT_ASSET = case_when(TOT_ASSET < 0 ~ 0,
                                       .default = TOT_ASSET))
df <- df |> mutate(across(c("TOT_REV", "TOT_ASSET"), log1p)) #log1p adds 1 first to avoid 0s

library(data.table)
df <- arrange(df, TAX_YEAR)
df.lag <- shift(df[,7:ncol(df)], n = 1:3, give.names = TRUE)
df <- bind_cols(df, df.lag)
rm(df.lag)

df <- df |> filter(TAX_YEAR >= 1994)

df_sub <- df |> dplyr::select(CountyID, lat, lng) |> unique()

x <- cbind(df_sub$lat, df_sub$lng) # inputs: latitude and longitude

# SVC
d <- rdist(x)
K <- Matern(d, smoothness=.5) # for smoothness paramter, should we do some sort of optimization?
E <- eigen(K)

options(repr.plot.width = 6, repr.plot.height = 4)
lls = list()
ls_list = list()
for (num_svc in seq(10,100,10)){
      curr_name <- as.character(num_svc*2)
      x_s <- cbind(x[,1] * E$vectors[,1:num_svc], x[,2] * E$vectors[,1:num_svc]) # would have to play around with this number
      
      # add SVC back into panel data
      xs_vars <- paste0("x_s", seq_len(ncol(x_s)))
      colnames(x_s) <- xs_vars
      df_sub.temp <- cbind(df_sub, x_s)
      
      df.temp <- merge(df, df_sub.temp |> dplyr::select(-lat, -lng), by = "CountyID", all = TRUE)

      upper_formula <- paste(
        "treat.FEMA_nDis ~ TAX_YEAR + bachelors_perc + med_household_income_adj + white_perc + total_population +",
        paste0(do.call(paste0, expand.grid(paste0(se_vars, "_lag_"), 1:3)), collapse = " + "), "+",
        paste0(do.call(paste0, expand.grid(paste0(ntee_vars, "_lag_"), 1:3)), collapse = " + "), "+",
        paste0(do.call(paste0, expand.grid(paste0(other_vars, "_lag_"), 1:3)), collapse = " + "), "+",
        paste(xs_vars, collapse = " + "))
      
      # regression
      ls_list[[curr_name]] <- glm(as.formula(upper_formula), data = df.temp, family = binomial(link = "logit"))
      #summary(ls)

      yweight <- predict(ls_list[[curr_name]], type="response")
      png(paste0("svc_plots/no_interference/svc", num_svc*2, "_Mar19.png"))
      plot(sort(yweight), main = paste("# SVC =", num_svc*2), cex = 0.10)
      dev.off()
} # winner was num_svc = 30 on March 10, but on March 19 200 is the winner by a landslide

library(lmtest)
my_test <- lrtest(ls_list[["100"]], ls_list[["200"]])
my_test

AIC(ls_list[["100"]], ls_list[["200"]])
BIC(ls_list[["100"]], ls_list[["200"]])

y_pred <- predict(ls_list[["200"]], df.temp, type = "response")
quantile(y_pred, na.rm = TRUE, probs = seq(0,1,0.1)) # all probs between 0.02 and 0.95
# sum(near(y_pred, 1), na.rm = TRUE)
# sort(y_pred, decreasing = FALSE) 
```

### Determining units that violate positivity assumption
```{r}
library(readr)
library(tidyr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
library(data.table)

panel_df <- readRDS("panel_data/no_int_panelV2.rds")

se_vars <- colnames(panel_df)[which(colnames(panel_df) == "bachelors_perc"):which(colnames(panel_df) == "total_population")] 
org_vars <- colnames(panel_df)[which(colnames(panel_df) == "TOT_REV"):which(colnames(panel_df) == "NTEEV2_NA")] 
svc_vars <- colnames(panel_df)[which(colnames(panel_df) == "x_s1"):ncol(panel_df)]

panel_df  <- arrange(panel_df, TAX_YEAR)
df.lag <- shift(panel_df[,5:which(colnames(panel_df) == "NTEEV2_NA")], n = 1:3, give.names = TRUE)
panel_df <- bind_cols(panel_df, df.lag)
rm(df.lag)

vars_lagged <- colnames(panel_df)[which(colnames(panel_df) == "bachelors_perc_lag_1"):which(colnames(panel_df) == "NTEEV2_NA_lag_3")] 

panel_df <- panel_df |> filter(TAX_YEAR >= 1994 & TAX_YEAR <= 2020)

glm_formula <- paste("treat.FEMA ~ TAX_YEAR +", 
                     paste0(c(se_vars, org_vars), collapse = " + "), "+",
                     paste0(vars_lagged, collapse = " + "), "+",
                     paste(svc_vars, collapse = " + "))
      
# regression
ls <- glm(as.formula(glm_formula), data = panel_df, family = binomial(link = "logit"))
summary(ls)

yweight <- predict(ls, type="response")

# png(filename = paste0("svc_plots/int/svc", num_svc*2, ".png"))
plot(sort(yweight), main = paste("# SVC =", 100), cex = 0.10)
# dev.off()
min(yweight) # 0.000079
max(yweight) # 0.912
quantile(yweight) # 25-75% between 0.212 and 0.399 -- median is 0.294

prob0 <- names(yweight[yweight < 0.001]) # its two counties 2247 and 2248
as.data.frame(panel_df[prob0,] |> arrange(CountyID) |> select(CountyID, TAX_YEAR))
prob0_IDs <- panel_df[prob0,] |> select(CountyID) |> unique()

library(PanelMatch)
panel_sub <- panel_df |> filter(CountyID %in% prob0_IDs$CountyID) |> select(CountyID, TAX_YEAR, treat.FEMA, TOT_REV, geoid_2010) |> arrange(CountyID) |> 
      group_by(CountyID) |>
      mutate(ID = as.integer(cur_group_id())) |>
      ungroup()

panel_sub <- PanelData(panel.data = as.data.frame(panel_sub),
                      unit.id = "ID",
                      time.id = "TAX_YEAR",
                      treatment = "treat.FEMA",
                      outcome = "TOT_REV")
DisplayTreatment(panel.data = panel_sub, 
                                 color.of.treated = "#DC267F",
                                 color.of.untreated = "#648FFF",
                                 title = "Treatment Distribution Across Units and Time",
                                 xlab = "Tax Year", ylab = "County", 
                                 legend.position = "right",
                                 legend.labels = c("untreated", "treated"),
                                 hide.x.tick.label = FALSE, hide.y.tick.label = FALSE)
```

```{r}
library(readr)
library(tidyr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
library(data.table)

panel_df <- readRDS("panel_data/no_int_panelV3.rds")

se_vars <- colnames(panel_df)[which(colnames(panel_df) == "bachelors_perc"):which(colnames(panel_df) == "total_population")] 
org_vars <- colnames(panel_df)[which(colnames(panel_df) == "TOT_REV"):which(colnames(panel_df) == "NTEEV2_NA")] 
svc_vars <- colnames(panel_df)[which(colnames(panel_df) == "x_s1"):ncol(panel_df)]

panel_df  <- arrange(panel_df, TAX_YEAR)
df.lag <- shift(panel_df[,5:which(colnames(panel_df) == "NTEEV2_NA")], n = 1:3, give.names = TRUE)
panel_df <- bind_cols(panel_df, df.lag)
rm(df.lag)

vars_lagged <- colnames(panel_df)[which(colnames(panel_df) == "bachelors_perc_lag_1"):which(colnames(panel_df) == "NTEEV2_NA_lag_3")] 

panel_df <- panel_df |> filter(TAX_YEAR >= 1994 & TAX_YEAR <= 2020)

glm_formula <- paste("treat.FEMA ~ TAX_YEAR +", 
                     paste0(c(se_vars, org_vars), collapse = " + "), "+",
                     paste0(vars_lagged, collapse = " + "), "+",
                     paste(svc_vars, collapse = " + "))
      
# regression
ls <- glm(as.formula(glm_formula), data = panel_df, family = binomial(link = "logit"))
summary(ls)

yweight <- predict(ls, type="response")

# png(filename = paste0("svc_plots/int/svc", num_svc*2, ".png"))
plot(sort(yweight), main = paste("# SVC =", 100), cex = 0.10)
# dev.off()
min(yweight) # 0
max(yweight) # 0.912
quantile(yweight) # 25-75% between 0.212 and 0.399 -- median is 0.294

prob0 <- names(yweight[yweight < 0.001]) # 2247, 2248, 2544, 2545, 2546
as.data.frame(panel_df[prob0,] |> arrange(CountyID) |> select(CountyID, TAX_YEAR))
prob0_IDs <- panel_df[prob0,] |> select(CountyID) |> unique()

library(PanelMatch)
panel_sub <- panel_df |> filter(CountyID %in% prob0_IDs$CountyID) |> select(CountyID, TAX_YEAR, treat.FEMA, TOT_REV, geoid_2010) |> arrange(CountyID) |> 
      group_by(CountyID) |>
      mutate(ID = as.integer(cur_group_id())) |>
      ungroup()
panel_sub <- PanelData(panel.data = as.data.frame(panel_sub),
                      unit.id = "ID",
                      time.id = "TAX_YEAR",
                      treatment = "treat.FEMA",
                      outcome = "TOT_REV")
DisplayTreatment(panel.data = panel_sub, 
                                 color.of.treated = "#DC267F",
                                 color.of.untreated = "#648FFF",
                                 title = "Treatment Distribution Across Units and Time",
                                 xlab = "Tax Year", ylab = "County", 
                                 legend.position = "right",
                                 legend.labels = c("untreated", "treated"),
                                 hide.x.tick.label = TRUE, hide.y.tick.label = FALSE)
```

```{r}
library(PanelMatch)

L = 3
folder_path_match <- "matches/with_svc/no_int_panelV3/config4/" # "matches/with_svc/no_int_panelV2/config3/"
save_name <- paste0("Lag", L)
match_method <- "none"

# Retrieve the PanelMatch objects
matches_list <- readRDS(paste0(folder_path_match, save_name, ".rds"))
m.out <- matches_list[[match_method]]
summary(m.out)

matched_sets <- extract(m.out)

treated <- names(matched_sets)

my_list <- c("2247.2011", "2247.2012", "2247.2013", "2247.2014", "2247.2015", "2247.2019", "2247.2020",
             "2248.2011", "2248.2012", "2248.2013", "2248.2014", "2248.2015", "2248.2019", "2248.2020",
             "2544.2019", "2545.2019", "2546.2019")

intersect(treated, my_list) # empty!!! well duh... would only show up in control units

matched_controls <- weights(matched_sets)
matched_controls <- lapply(matched_controls, function(x) x[x > 0])
untreated <- lapply(matched_controls, function(x) names(x))
untreated <- unlist(untreated, use.names = FALSE)
untreated <- unique(untreated)

intersect(untreated, my_list) # empty... makes sense that treated units probably all have nonzero propensities

my_list <- c("2247.2012", "2247.2013", "2247.2014", "2247.2015", "2247.2016", "2247.2020", "2247.2021",
             "2248.2012", "2248.2013", "2248.2014", "2248.2015", "2248.2016", "2248.2020", "2248.2021",
             "2544.2020", "2545.2020", "2546.2020")

intersect(treated, my_list) # empty!!! well duh... would only show up in control units
```

# PanelMatch - Interference
## Setup
```{r}
library(data.table)
library(readr)
library(tidyr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(PanelMatch)
library(ggplot2)
library(writexl)
library(haven)
library(geosphere)
library(fastDummies)
source("matches_helper.R")

df <- readRDS("county_long.rds")
df <- df |> 
      group_by(geoid_2010) |>
      mutate(CountyID = as.integer(cur_group_id())) |>
      ungroup()

# make sure these are numeric
df <- df |> mutate(across(all_of(c("bachelors_perc", "med_household_income_adj", "white_perc")), as.numeric)) 

# Add REGION dummy columns
df <- df |> dummy_cols(select_columns = c("REGION"), ignore_na = FALSE, remove_selected_columns = TRUE, remove_first_dummy = FALSE)

# These are the variables we will adjust for
adj_set <- c("bachelors_perc", "med_household_income_adj", "white_perc",  "total_population", "TOT_REV", "TOT_ASSET","TOT_EXP", "lat", "lng")

# Other variables
ntee_vars <- grep("^NTEEV2_", names(df), value = TRUE)
region_vars <- grep("^REGION_", names(df), value = TRUE)

df <- df |> dplyr::select(all_of(c(c("CountyID", "TAX_YEAR", "geoid_2010", "treat.FEMA"), adj_set, ntee_vars, region_vars)))

# Log transformations
# saveRDS(df |> filter(TOT_REV < 0 | TOT_ASSET < 0 | TOT_EXP < 0), "misc_analysis/intV2_negative.rds")
df <- df |> mutate(TOT_REV = case_when(TOT_REV < 0 ~ 0,
                                       .default = TOT_REV),
                   TOT_ASSET = case_when(TOT_ASSET < 0 ~ 0,
                                       .default = TOT_ASSET),
                   TOT_EXP = case_when(TOT_EXP < 0 ~ 0,
                                       .default = TOT_EXP))

df <- df |> mutate(TOT_REV = log1p(TOT_REV),
                   TOT_ASSET = log1p(TOT_ASSET),
                   TOT_EXP = log1p(TOT_EXP),
                   med_household_income_adj = log1p(med_household_income_adj),
                   total_population = log(total_population))

# Create new treatment variable that takes a distance-based cutoff adjustment
adj_lists <- create_adj_list(panel_data = df, dist_cutoff = 25)

res <- add_exposed(panel_data = df, adj_list = adj_lists$union, treatment = "treat.FEMA")

df <- res$df |> mutate(treat.FEMA.adj = replace_na(treat.FEMA.adj, 1))

per_year_summary <- df |> group_by(TAX_YEAR) |>
      summarise(
            n_1 = sum(treat.FEMA.adj == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
            n_0 = sum(treat.FEMA.adj == 0, na.rm = TRUE),
            n = n())

paste("Treated")
quantile(per_year_summary$n_1, probs = seq(0,1,0.1))

paste("Control")
quantile(per_year_summary$n_0, probs = seq(0,1,0.1))

paste("Total")
quantile(per_year_summary$n, probs = seq(0,1,0.1))

# 1859 is New York County
# df$treat.FEMA.adj[((df$CountyID == 1859) & (df$TAX_YEAR == 2001))] <- NA # note they were untreated before so don't have to correct above
# df[((df$CountyID == 1859) & (df$TAX_YEAR == 2001)),]

# Adding spatially varying coefficients
# df <- add_SVC(df, num_E_vec = 50)
df$treat.FEMA <- NULL

# https://stackoverflow.com/questions/74815244/panelmatch-r-errors-please-convert-time-id-to-consecutive-integers-and-pleas
panel_df <- PanelData(panel.data = as.data.frame(df),
                      unit.id = "CountyID",
                      time.id = "TAX_YEAR",
                      treatment = "treat.FEMA.adj",
                      outcome = "TOT_REV")

# rm(df)
# saveRDS(panel_df, "panel_data/int_panelV1.rds") # No SVC, exposed treatment = 1
# saveRDS(panel_df, "panel_data/int_panelV2.rds") # With SVC, exposed treatment = 1
# saveRDS(panel_df, "panel_data/int_panelV3.rds") # V2 but no log transformations

DisplayTreatment(panel.data = panel_df, 
                  color.of.treated = "#DC267F", #"#FFB000"
                  color.of.untreated = "#648FFF", #"#785EF0"
                  title = "Exposure Distribution Across Units and Time",
                  xlab = "Tax Year", ylab = "County", 
                  legend.position = "right",
                  legend.labels = c("unexposed", "exposed"),
                  hide.x.tick.label = TRUE, hide.y.tick.label = TRUE, 
                  dense.plot = TRUE)
```

## Matching Methods - Config 3, With SVC
```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(PanelMatch)
library(ggplot2)
library(writexl)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(khroma)
source("matches_helper.R")

# panel_df <- readRDS("panel_data/int_panelV2.rds")

# Set up the folder path and saved object names
L = 3 # lag, options: 1, 3, 5
folder_path_match <- "matches/with_svc/int_panelV2/config3/"
folder_path_balance <- "balances/with_svc/int_panelV2/config3/"
save_name <- paste0("Lag", L)

# Retrieve the PanelMatch objects
matches_list <- readRDS(paste0(folder_path_match, save_name, ".rds"))

# Retrieve the PanelBalance objects
balances_list <- readRDS(paste0(folder_path_balance, save_name, ".rds"))

# Make the balances for each lag easy to work with as a dataframe
bal_df <- lapply(balances_list, summary)
bal_df <- lapply(bal_df, as.data.frame)
bal_df <- lapply(bal_df, tibble::rownames_to_column, var = "time")

# Print information about matching and balances
# write.csv(as.data.frame(summary(matches_list$none)), "match_summary.csv")
summary(matches_list$none)
summary(matches_list$ps.match)
# summary(matches_list$CBPS.match)
# summary(matches_list$ps.weight)
# summary(matches_list$CBPS.weight)
# 
plot(matches_list$none)
```


Default Matching Weights Plots
```{r}
# plot(extract(matches_list$CBPS.weight), panel.data = panel_df)
```


Default Scatter Plots
```{r}
# plot(balances_list$none, type = "scatter", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = TRUE, 
#      main = "Standardized Mean Difference of Covariates (No Matching)")
# plot(balances_list$mahalanobis, type = "scatter", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = TRUE,
#      ylim = c(-0.01,.1), main = "Standardized Mean Difference of Covariates (PS Matching)")
plot(balances_list$ps.match, type = "scatter", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = TRUE,
     ylim = c(-0.01,.1), main = "Standardized Mean Difference of Covariates (PS Matching)")
plot(balances_list$CBPS.match, type = "scatter", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = TRUE,
     ylim = c(-0.01,.1), main = "Standardized Mean Difference of Covariates (CBPS Matching)")
plot(balances_list$ps.weight, type = "scatter", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = TRUE,
     ylim = c(-0.01,.1), main = "Standardized Mean Difference of Covariates (PS Weighting)")
plot(balances_list$CBPS.weight, type = "scatter", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = TRUE,
     ylim = c(-0.01,.1), main = "Standardized Mean Difference of Covariates (CBPS Weighting)")
```


Default Covariate Balance Plots
```{r}
# plot(balances_list$none, type = "panel", include.unrefined.panel = FALSE, legend = TRUE, main = "No Matching") 
# plot(balances_list$ps.match, type = "panel", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = FALSE, main = "PS Matching", main.unrefined = "PS Matching (unrefined)") 
# plot(balances_list$CBPS.match, type = "panel", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = FALSE, main = "CBPS Matching", main.unrefined = "CBPS Matching (unrefined)") 
# plot(balances_list$ps.weight, type = "panel", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = FALSE, main = "PS Weighting", main.unrefined = "PS Weighting (unrefined)") 
# plot(balances_list$CBPS.weight, type = "panel", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = FALSE, main = "CBPS Weighting", main.unrefined = "CBPS Weighting (unrefined)") 
```

My Covariate Balance Plots
```{r}
covs_to_check <- c("bachelors_perc", "med_household_income_adj", "white_perc",  "total_population", "TOT_REV", "TOT_ASSET", "TOT_EXP", "NTEEV2_ART", "NTEEV2_EDU", "NTEEV2_ENV", "NTEEV2_HEL", "NTEEV2_HMS", "NTEEV2_HOS", "NTEEV2_IFA", "NTEEV2_MMB", "NTEEV2_PSB", "NTEEV2_REL", "NTEEV2_UNI", "NTEEV2_UNU", "NTEEV2_NA", "REGION_MIDWEST", "REGION_NORTHEAST", "REGION_SOUTH", "REGION_WEST")

bal_none <- tidy_bal_df(bal_data = bal_df$none, covariates = paste0("m.out.",covs_to_check))
bal_ps.match <- tidy_bal_df(bal_data = bal_df$ps.match, covariates = paste0("m.out.",covs_to_check))
bal_cbps.match <- tidy_bal_df(bal_data = bal_df$CBPS.match, covariates = paste0("m.out.",covs_to_check))
bal_ps.weight <- tidy_bal_df(bal_data = bal_df$ps.weight, covariates = paste0("m.out.",covs_to_check))
bal_cbps.weight <- tidy_bal_df(bal_data = bal_df$CBPS.weight, covariates = paste0("m.out.",covs_to_check))
```

```{r}
ylims <- list("base" = c(-0.15, 0.05), "ntee" = c(-0.15, 0.05), "loc" = c(-0.17,0.17), "unrefined" = c(-0.15, 0.05), "all" = c(-0.17, 0.17))
p_none <- no_int_no_SVC_plots(bal_none,
                              match_method = "No Matching",
                              ylim_base = ylims[["base"]], 
                              ylim_ntee = ylims[["ntee"]],
                              ylim_loc = ylims[["loc"]],
                              ylim_all = ylims[["all"]],
                              include.unrefined.panel = FALSE)
p_ps.match <- no_int_no_SVC_plots(bal_ps.match, 
                                  match_method = "PS Matching",
                                  ylim_base = ylims[["base"]], 
                                  ylim_ntee = ylims[["ntee"]],
                                  ylim_loc = ylims[["loc"]],
                                  ylim_all = ylims[["all"]],
                                  ylim_unrefined = ylims[["unrefined"]],
                                  include.unrefined.panel = TRUE)
p_cbps.match <- no_int_no_SVC_plots(bal_cbps.match,
                                  match_method = "CBPS Matching",
                                  ylim_base = ylims[["base"]], 
                                  ylim_ntee = ylims[["ntee"]],
                                  ylim_loc = ylims[["loc"]],
                                  ylim_all = ylims[["all"]],
                                  include.unrefined.panel = FALSE)
p_ps.weight <- no_int_no_SVC_plots(bal_ps.weight,
                                  match_method = "PS Weighting",
                                  ylim_base = ylims[["base"]], 
                                  ylim_ntee = ylims[["ntee"]],
                                  ylim_loc = ylims[["loc"]],
                                  ylim_all = ylims[["all"]],
                                  include.unrefined.panel = FALSE)
p_cbps.weight <- no_int_no_SVC_plots(bal_cbps.weight,
                                  match_method = "CBPS Weighting",
                                  ylim_base = ylims[["base"]], 
                                  ylim_ntee = ylims[["ntee"]],
                                  ylim_loc = ylims[["loc"]],
                                  ylim_all = ylims[["all"]],
                                  include.unrefined.panel = FALSE)

options(repr.plot.width = 6, repr.plot.height = 4)

p_none$all
# p_ps.match$all_unrefined
# p_ps.match$all
# p_cbps.match$all
# p_ps.weight$all
p_cbps.weight$all
# 
p_none$base
# p_ps.match$base_unrefined
# p_ps.match$base
# p_cbps.match$base
# p_ps.weight$base
p_cbps.weight$base
# 
p_none$ntee
# p_ps.match$ntee_unrefined
# p_ps.match$ntee
# p_cbps.match$ntee
# p_ps.weight$ntee
p_cbps.weight$ntee
# 
p_none$loc
# p_ps.match$loc_unrefined
# p_ps.match$loc
# p_cbps.match$loc
# p_ps.weight$loc
p_cbps.weight$loc

library(cowplot)
tmp <- p_none$all + theme(legend.position = "bottom")
g <- ggplotGrob(tmp)
leg <- g$grobs[[which(g$layout$name == "guide-box-bottom")]]

prow <- plot_grid(p_none$all + theme(legend.position="none"), p_cbps.weight$all + theme(legend.position="none"), labels = "AUTO", hjust = -1, nrow = 1)
plot_grid(prow, leg, ncol = 1, rel_heights = c(1, .1))
```

```{r}
q_none <- quantile(signif(abs(bal_none$value[bal_none$unrefined == FALSE]), 3), probs = seq(0,1,0.1))
q_ps.mat <- quantile(signif(abs(bal_ps.match$value[bal_ps.match$unrefined == FALSE]), 3), probs = seq(0,1,0.1))
q_cbps.mat <- quantile(signif(abs(bal_cbps.match$value[bal_cbps.match$unrefined == FALSE]), 3), probs = seq(0,1,0.1))
q_ps.w <- quantile(signif(abs(bal_ps.weight$value[bal_ps.weight$unrefined == FALSE]), 3), probs = seq(0,1,0.1))
q_cbps.w <- quantile(signif(abs(bal_cbps.weight$value[bal_cbps.weight$unrefined == FALSE]), 3), probs = seq(0,1,0.1))

df <- cbind(as.data.frame(q_none), as.data.frame(q_ps.mat), as.data.frame(q_cbps.mat), as.data.frame(q_ps.w), as.data.frame(q_cbps.w))

df$winner <- colnames(df)[max.col(-df, ties.method = "first")]

write.csv(df, file = paste0(folder_path_balance, save_name, "deciles.csv"))

write.csv(bal_none |> filter(unrefined == FALSE) |> select(-unrefined) |>
                pivot_wider(names_from = covariate, values_from = value) |>
                mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, digits = 5))),
          file = "balance.csv")

write.csv(bal_cbps.weight |> filter(unrefined == FALSE) |> select(-unrefined) |>
                pivot_wider(names_from = covariate, values_from = value) |>
                mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, digits = 5))),
          file = "balance.csv")
```

## Matching Methods - Config 4, With SVC
```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(PanelMatch)
library(ggplot2)
library(writexl)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(khroma)
source("matches_helper.R")

# panel_df <- readRDS("panel_data/int_panelV2.rds")

# Set up the folder path and saved object names
L = 3 # lag, options: 1, 3, 5
folder_path_match <- "matches/with_svc/int_panelV3/config4/"
folder_path_balance <- "balances/with_svc/int_panelV3/config4/"
save_name <- paste0("Lag", L)

# Retrieve the PanelMatch objects
matches_list <- readRDS(paste0(folder_path_match, save_name, ".rds"))

# Retrieve the PanelBalance objects
balances_list <- readRDS(paste0(folder_path_balance, save_name, ".rds"))

# Make the balances for each lag easy to work with as a dataframe
bal_df <- lapply(balances_list, summary)
bal_df <- lapply(bal_df, as.data.frame)
bal_df <- lapply(bal_df, tibble::rownames_to_column, var = "time")

# Print information about matching and balances
# write.csv(as.data.frame(summary(matches_list$none)), "match_summary.csv")
summary(matches_list$none)
summary(matches_list$ps.match)
# summary(matches_list$CBPS.match)
# summary(matches_list$ps.weight)
# summary(matches_list$CBPS.weight)
# 
plot(matches_list$none)
```


Default Matching Weights Plots
```{r}
# plot(extract(matches_list$CBPS.weight), panel.data = panel_df)
```


Default Scatter Plots
```{r}
# plot(balances_list$none, type = "scatter", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = TRUE, 
#      main = "Standardized Mean Difference of Covariates (No Matching)")
# plot(balances_list$mahalanobis, type = "scatter", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = TRUE,
#      ylim = c(-0.01,.1), main = "Standardized Mean Difference of Covariates (PS Matching)")
plot(balances_list$ps.match, type = "scatter", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = TRUE,
     ylim = c(-0.01,.1), main = "Standardized Mean Difference of Covariates (PS Matching)")
plot(balances_list$CBPS.match, type = "scatter", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = TRUE,
     ylim = c(-0.01,.1), main = "Standardized Mean Difference of Covariates (CBPS Matching)")
plot(balances_list$ps.weight, type = "scatter", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = TRUE,
     ylim = c(-0.01,.1), main = "Standardized Mean Difference of Covariates (PS Weighting)")
plot(balances_list$CBPS.weight, type = "scatter", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = TRUE,
     ylim = c(-0.01,.1), main = "Standardized Mean Difference of Covariates (CBPS Weighting)")
```


Default Covariate Balance Plots
```{r}
# plot(balances_list$none, type = "panel", include.unrefined.panel = FALSE, legend = TRUE, main = "No Matching") 
# plot(balances_list$ps.match, type = "panel", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = FALSE, main = "PS Matching", main.unrefined = "PS Matching (unrefined)") 
# plot(balances_list$CBPS.match, type = "panel", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = FALSE, main = "CBPS Matching", main.unrefined = "CBPS Matching (unrefined)") 
# plot(balances_list$ps.weight, type = "panel", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = FALSE, main = "PS Weighting", main.unrefined = "PS Weighting (unrefined)") 
# plot(balances_list$CBPS.weight, type = "panel", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = FALSE, main = "CBPS Weighting", main.unrefined = "CBPS Weighting (unrefined)") 
```

My Covariate Balance Plots
```{r}
covs_to_check <- c("bachelors_perc", "med_household_income_adj", "white_perc",  "total_population", "TOT_REV", "TOT_ASSET", "TOT_EXP", "NTEEV2_ART", "NTEEV2_EDU", "NTEEV2_ENV", "NTEEV2_HEL", "NTEEV2_HMS", "NTEEV2_HOS", "NTEEV2_IFA", "NTEEV2_MMB", "NTEEV2_PSB", "NTEEV2_REL", "NTEEV2_UNI", "NTEEV2_UNU", "NTEEV2_NA", "REGION_MIDWEST", "REGION_NORTHEAST", "REGION_SOUTH", "REGION_WEST")

bal_none <- tidy_bal_df(bal_data = bal_df$none, covariates = paste0("m.out.",covs_to_check))
bal_ps.match <- tidy_bal_df(bal_data = bal_df$ps.match, covariates = paste0("m.out.",covs_to_check))
bal_cbps.match <- tidy_bal_df(bal_data = bal_df$CBPS.match, covariates = paste0("m.out.",covs_to_check))
bal_ps.weight <- tidy_bal_df(bal_data = bal_df$ps.weight, covariates = paste0("m.out.",covs_to_check))
bal_cbps.weight <- tidy_bal_df(bal_data = bal_df$CBPS.weight, covariates = paste0("m.out.",covs_to_check))
```

```{r}
ylims <- list("base" = c(-0.15, 0.05), "ntee" = c(-0.15, 0.05), "loc" = c(-0.17,0.17), "unrefined" = c(-0.15, 0.05), "all" = c(-0.17, 0.17))
p_none <- no_int_no_SVC_plots(bal_none,
                              match_method = "No Matching",
                              ylim_base = ylims[["base"]], 
                              ylim_ntee = ylims[["ntee"]],
                              ylim_loc = ylims[["loc"]],
                              ylim_all = ylims[["all"]],
                              include.unrefined.panel = FALSE)
p_ps.match <- no_int_no_SVC_plots(bal_ps.match, 
                                  match_method = "PS Matching",
                                  ylim_base = ylims[["base"]], 
                                  ylim_ntee = ylims[["ntee"]],
                                  ylim_loc = ylims[["loc"]],
                                  ylim_all = ylims[["all"]],
                                  ylim_unrefined = ylims[["unrefined"]],
                                  include.unrefined.panel = TRUE)
p_cbps.match <- no_int_no_SVC_plots(bal_cbps.match,
                                  match_method = "CBPS Matching",
                                  ylim_base = ylims[["base"]], 
                                  ylim_ntee = ylims[["ntee"]],
                                  ylim_loc = ylims[["loc"]],
                                  ylim_all = ylims[["all"]],
                                  include.unrefined.panel = FALSE)
p_ps.weight <- no_int_no_SVC_plots(bal_ps.weight,
                                  match_method = "PS Weighting",
                                  ylim_base = ylims[["base"]], 
                                  ylim_ntee = ylims[["ntee"]],
                                  ylim_loc = ylims[["loc"]],
                                  ylim_all = ylims[["all"]],
                                  include.unrefined.panel = FALSE)
p_cbps.weight <- no_int_no_SVC_plots(bal_cbps.weight,
                                  match_method = "CBPS Weighting",
                                  ylim_base = ylims[["base"]], 
                                  ylim_ntee = ylims[["ntee"]],
                                  ylim_loc = ylims[["loc"]],
                                  ylim_all = ylims[["all"]],
                                  include.unrefined.panel = FALSE)

options(repr.plot.width = 6, repr.plot.height = 4)

p_none$all
# p_ps.match$all_unrefined
# p_ps.match$all
# p_cbps.match$all
# p_ps.weight$all
p_cbps.weight$all
# 
# p_none$base
# p_ps.match$base_unrefined
# p_ps.match$base
# p_cbps.match$base
# p_ps.weight$base
p_cbps.weight$base
# 
# p_none$ntee
# p_ps.match$ntee_unrefined
# p_ps.match$ntee
# p_cbps.match$ntee
# p_ps.weight$ntee
p_cbps.weight$ntee
# 
# p_none$loc
# p_ps.match$loc_unrefined
# p_ps.match$loc
# p_cbps.match$loc
# p_ps.weight$loc
p_cbps.weight$loc

```

```{r}
q_none <- quantile(signif(abs(bal_none$value[bal_none$unrefined == FALSE]), 3), probs = seq(0,1,0.1))
q_ps.mat <- quantile(signif(abs(bal_ps.match$value[bal_ps.match$unrefined == FALSE]), 3), probs = seq(0,1,0.1))
q_cbps.mat <- quantile(signif(abs(bal_cbps.match$value[bal_cbps.match$unrefined == FALSE]), 3), probs = seq(0,1,0.1))
q_ps.w <- quantile(signif(abs(bal_ps.weight$value[bal_ps.weight$unrefined == FALSE]), 3), probs = seq(0,1,0.1))
q_cbps.w <- quantile(signif(abs(bal_cbps.weight$value[bal_cbps.weight$unrefined == FALSE]), 3), probs = seq(0,1,0.1))

df <- cbind(as.data.frame(q_none), as.data.frame(q_ps.mat), as.data.frame(q_cbps.mat), as.data.frame(q_ps.w), as.data.frame(q_cbps.w))

df$winner <- colnames(df)[max.col(-df, ties.method = "first")]

write.csv(df, file = paste0(folder_path_balance, save_name, "deciles.csv"))

write.csv(bal_none |> filter(unrefined == FALSE) |> select(-unrefined) |>
                pivot_wider(names_from = covariate, values_from = value) |>
                mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, digits = 5))),
          file = "balance.csv")

write.csv(bal_cbps.weight |> filter(unrefined == FALSE) |> select(-unrefined) |>
                pivot_wider(names_from = covariate, values_from = value) |>
                mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, digits = 5))),
          file = "balance.csv")
```

## Matching Methods - Config 3, NO SVC
```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(PanelMatch)
library(ggplot2)
library(writexl)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(khroma)
source("matches_helper.R")

# panel_df <- readRDS("panel_data/int_panelV1.rds")

# Set up the folder path and saved object names
L = 3 # lag, options: 1, 3, 5
folder_path_match <- "matches/no_svc/int_panelV1/config3/"
folder_path_balance <- "balances/no_svc/int_panelV1/config3/"
save_name <- paste0("Lag", L)

# Retrieve the PanelMatch objects
matches_list <- readRDS(paste0(folder_path_match, save_name, ".rds"))

# Retrieve the PanelBalance objects
balances_list <- readRDS(paste0(folder_path_balance, save_name, ".rds"))

# Make the balances for each lag easy to work with as a dataframe
bal_df <- lapply(balances_list, summary)
bal_df <- lapply(bal_df, as.data.frame)
bal_df <- lapply(bal_df, tibble::rownames_to_column, var = "time")

# Print information about matching and balances
# write.csv(as.data.frame(summary(matches_list$none)), "match_summary.csv")
summary(matches_list$none)
summary(matches_list$ps.match)
# summary(matches_list$CBPS.match)
# summary(matches_list$ps.weight)
# summary(matches_list$CBPS.weight)
# 
plot(matches_list$none)
```


Default Matching Weights Plots
```{r}
# plot(extract(matches_list$CBPS.weight), panel.data = panel_df)
```


Default Scatter Plots
```{r}
# plot(balances_list$none, type = "scatter", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = TRUE, 
#      main = "Standardized Mean Difference of Covariates (No Matching)")
# plot(balances_list$mahalanobis, type = "scatter", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = TRUE,
#      ylim = c(-0.01,.1), main = "Standardized Mean Difference of Covariates (PS Matching)")
plot(balances_list$ps.match, type = "scatter", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = TRUE,
     ylim = c(-0.01,.1), main = "Standardized Mean Difference of Covariates (PS Matching)")
plot(balances_list$CBPS.match, type = "scatter", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = TRUE,
     ylim = c(-0.01,.1), main = "Standardized Mean Difference of Covariates (CBPS Matching)")
plot(balances_list$ps.weight, type = "scatter", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = TRUE,
     ylim = c(-0.01,.1), main = "Standardized Mean Difference of Covariates (PS Weighting)")
plot(balances_list$CBPS.weight, type = "scatter", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = TRUE,
     ylim = c(-0.01,.1), main = "Standardized Mean Difference of Covariates (CBPS Weighting)")
```


Default Covariate Balance Plots
```{r}
# plot(balances_list$none, type = "panel", include.unrefined.panel = FALSE, legend = TRUE, main = "No Matching") 
# plot(balances_list$ps.match, type = "panel", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = FALSE, main = "PS Matching", main.unrefined = "PS Matching (unrefined)") 
# plot(balances_list$CBPS.match, type = "panel", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = FALSE, main = "CBPS Matching", main.unrefined = "CBPS Matching (unrefined)") 
# plot(balances_list$ps.weight, type = "panel", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = FALSE, main = "PS Weighting", main.unrefined = "PS Weighting (unrefined)") 
# plot(balances_list$CBPS.weight, type = "panel", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = FALSE, main = "CBPS Weighting", main.unrefined = "CBPS Weighting (unrefined)") 
```

My Covariate Balance Plots
```{r}
covs_to_check <- c("bachelors_perc", "med_household_income_adj", "white_perc",  "total_population", "TOT_REV", "TOT_ASSET", "TOT_EXP", "NTEEV2_ART", "NTEEV2_EDU", "NTEEV2_ENV", "NTEEV2_HEL", "NTEEV2_HMS", "NTEEV2_HOS", "NTEEV2_IFA", "NTEEV2_MMB", "NTEEV2_PSB", "NTEEV2_REL", "NTEEV2_UNI", "NTEEV2_UNU", "NTEEV2_NA", "REGION_MIDWEST", "REGION_NORTHEAST", "REGION_SOUTH", "REGION_WEST")

bal_none <- tidy_bal_df(bal_data = bal_df$none, covariates = paste0("m.out.",covs_to_check))
bal_ps.match <- tidy_bal_df(bal_data = bal_df$ps.match, covariates = paste0("m.out.",covs_to_check))
bal_cbps.match <- tidy_bal_df(bal_data = bal_df$CBPS.match, covariates = paste0("m.out.",covs_to_check))
bal_ps.weight <- tidy_bal_df(bal_data = bal_df$ps.weight, covariates = paste0("m.out.",covs_to_check))
bal_cbps.weight <- tidy_bal_df(bal_data = bal_df$CBPS.weight, covariates = paste0("m.out.",covs_to_check))
```

```{r}
ylims <- list("base" = c(-0.15, 0.05), "ntee" = c(-0.15, 0.05), "loc" = c(-0.17,0.17), "unrefined" = c(-0.15, 0.05), "all" = c(-0.17, 0.17))
p_none <- no_int_no_SVC_plots(bal_none,
                              match_method = "No Matching",
                              ylim_base = ylims[["base"]], 
                              ylim_ntee = ylims[["ntee"]],
                              ylim_loc = ylims[["loc"]],
                              ylim_all = ylims[["all"]],
                              include.unrefined.panel = FALSE)
p_ps.match <- no_int_no_SVC_plots(bal_ps.match, 
                                  match_method = "PS Matching",
                                  ylim_base = ylims[["base"]], 
                                  ylim_ntee = ylims[["ntee"]],
                                  ylim_loc = ylims[["loc"]],
                                  ylim_all = ylims[["all"]],
                                  ylim_unrefined = ylims[["unrefined"]],
                                  include.unrefined.panel = TRUE)
p_cbps.match <- no_int_no_SVC_plots(bal_cbps.match,
                                  match_method = "CBPS Matching",
                                  ylim_base = ylims[["base"]], 
                                  ylim_ntee = ylims[["ntee"]],
                                  ylim_loc = ylims[["loc"]],
                                  ylim_all = ylims[["all"]],
                                  include.unrefined.panel = FALSE)
p_ps.weight <- no_int_no_SVC_plots(bal_ps.weight,
                                  match_method = "PS Weighting",
                                  ylim_base = ylims[["base"]], 
                                  ylim_ntee = ylims[["ntee"]],
                                  ylim_loc = ylims[["loc"]],
                                  ylim_all = ylims[["all"]],
                                  include.unrefined.panel = FALSE)
p_cbps.weight <- no_int_no_SVC_plots(bal_cbps.weight,
                                  match_method = "CBPS Weighting",
                                  ylim_base = ylims[["base"]], 
                                  ylim_ntee = ylims[["ntee"]],
                                  ylim_loc = ylims[["loc"]],
                                  ylim_all = ylims[["all"]],
                                  include.unrefined.panel = FALSE)

options(repr.plot.width = 6, repr.plot.height = 4)

p_none$all
# p_ps.match$all_unrefined
# p_ps.match$all
# p_cbps.match$all
# p_ps.weight$all
p_cbps.weight$all
# 
p_none$base
# p_ps.match$base_unrefined
# p_ps.match$base
# p_cbps.match$base
# p_ps.weight$base
p_cbps.weight$base
# 
p_none$ntee
# p_ps.match$ntee_unrefined
# p_ps.match$ntee
# p_cbps.match$ntee
# p_ps.weight$ntee
p_cbps.weight$ntee
# 
p_none$loc
# p_ps.match$loc_unrefined
# p_ps.match$loc
# p_cbps.match$loc
# p_ps.weight$loc
p_cbps.weight$loc

```

```{r}
q_none <- quantile(signif(abs(bal_none$value[bal_none$unrefined == FALSE]), 3), probs = seq(0,1,0.1))
q_ps.mat <- quantile(signif(abs(bal_ps.match$value[bal_ps.match$unrefined == FALSE]), 3), probs = seq(0,1,0.1))
q_cbps.mat <- quantile(signif(abs(bal_cbps.match$value[bal_cbps.match$unrefined == FALSE]), 3), probs = seq(0,1,0.1))
q_ps.w <- quantile(signif(abs(bal_ps.weight$value[bal_ps.weight$unrefined == FALSE]), 3), probs = seq(0,1,0.1))
q_cbps.w <- quantile(signif(abs(bal_cbps.weight$value[bal_cbps.weight$unrefined == FALSE]), 3), probs = seq(0,1,0.1))

df <- cbind(as.data.frame(q_none), as.data.frame(q_ps.mat), as.data.frame(q_cbps.mat), as.data.frame(q_ps.w), as.data.frame(q_cbps.w))

df$winner <- colnames(df)[max.col(-df, ties.method = "first")]

write.csv(df, file = paste0(folder_path_balance, save_name, "deciles.csv"))

write.csv(bal_none |> filter(unrefined == FALSE) |> select(-unrefined) |>
                pivot_wider(names_from = covariate, values_from = value) |>
                mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, digits = 5))),
          file = "balance.csv")

write.csv(bal_cbps.weight |> filter(unrefined == FALSE) |> select(-unrefined) |>
                pivot_wider(names_from = covariate, values_from = value) |>
                mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, digits = 5))),
          file = "balance.csv")
```




## Estimates
### Config 3 versus Config 4 - Revenue, No Stratification

```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(PanelMatch)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)

# Set up the folder path and saved object names
L = 3 # lag, options: 1, 3, 5
save_name <- paste0("Lag", L)

folder_pathC3 <- "matches/with_svc/int_panelV2/config3/"
folder_pathC4 <- "matches/with_svc/int_panelV3/config4/"

# Retrieve the PanelMatch objects
matches_listC3 <- readRDS(paste0(folder_pathC3, save_name, ".rds"))
matches_listC4 <- readRDS(paste0(folder_pathC4, save_name, ".rds"))

# Retrieve the PanelData object
panel_dfC3 <- readRDS("panel_data/int_panelV2.rds")
panel_dfC4 <- readRDS("panel_data/int_panelV3.rds")

estimates_save_nameC3 <- "estimates/with_svc_intV2_con3_"
estimates_save_nameC4 <- "estimates/with_svc_intV3_con4_"

# No Matching
m.out.noneC3 <- matches_listC3$none
m.out.noneC4 <- matches_listC4$none
# attr(m.out.none, "outcome") <- "EXP_LN_REV"
# attr(m.out.none, "outcome.var") <- "EXP_LN_REV"

match_methodC3 <- "CBPS.weight"
match_methodC4 <- "CBPS.weight"

m.out.C3 <- matches_listC3[[match_methodC3]]
m.out.C4 <- matches_listC4[[match_methodC4]]

# outcome_vars <- c("TOT_REV", "REV_ART", "REV_EDU", "REV_HMS", "REV_PSB", "REV_ENV", "REV_HEL", "REV_HOS", "REV_UNI", "REV_MMB", "REV_ENV") # REV_REL, REV_IFA, REV_UNU, REV_NA

# outcome_vars <- c("REV_SIZE.1", "REV_SIZE.2", "REV_SIZE.3", "REV_SIZE.4", "REV_SIZE.5", "REV_SIZE.6") # "REV_SIZE.NA"
outcome_vars <- c("TOT_REV")

panel_dfC4 <- panel_dfC4 |> mutate(TOT_REV = case_when(TOT_REV < 0 ~ 1, .default = TOT_REV))
```

```{r}
# Estimates under no matching
res_no.match.C3 <- PanelEstimate(sets = m.out.noneC3,
                     panel.data = panel_dfC3,
                     se.method = "conditional", # "bootstrap" "unconditional"
                     parallel = TRUE,
                     num.cores = 6,
                     number.iterations = 10000)

res_no.match.C4 <- PanelEstimate(sets = m.out.noneC4,
                     panel.data = panel_dfC4,
                     se.method = "unconditional",
                     parallel = TRUE,
                     num.cores = 6,
                     number.iterations = 10000)

# Estimates under CBPS Weighting
res.C3 <- PanelEstimate(sets = m.out.C3,
                     panel.data = panel_dfC3,
                     se.method = "conditional",
                     parallel = TRUE,
                     num.cores = 6,
                     number.iterations = 10000)

res.C4 <- PanelEstimate(sets = m.out.C4,
                     panel.data = panel_dfC4,
                     se.method = "unconditional",
                     parallel = TRUE,
                     num.cores = 6,
                     number.iterations = 10000)
```

```{r}
plot(res_no.match.C3, main = "Estimated Effects (LOG REV) - No Matching")
summary(res_no.match.C3)
# hist(res_no.match.C3$bootstrapped.estimates) 
# as.data.frame(summary(res_no.match.C3)) |> mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ exp(.x)-1))

plot(res_no.match.C4, main = "Estimated Effects (REV) - No Matching")
summary(res_no.match.C4)
# hist(res_no.match.C4$bootstrapped.estimates)

plot(res.C3, main = "Estimated Effects (LOG REV) - CBPS Weighting")
summary(res.C3)
write.csv(as.data.frame(summary(res.C3)) |> mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(exp(.x), 5))), "res.csv")
# hist(res.C3$bootstrapped.estimates)

plot(res.C4, main = "Estimated Effects (REV) - CBPS Weighting")
summary(res.C4)
# hist(res.C4$bootstrapped.estimates)
```



### Config 3 versus Config 4 - Assets, No Stratification

```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(PanelMatch)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)

# Set up the folder path and saved object names
L = 3 # lag, options: 1, 3, 5
save_name <- paste0("Lag", L)

folder_pathC3 <- "matches/with_svc/int_panelV2/config3/"
folder_pathC4 <- "matches/with_svc/int_panelV3/config4/"

# Retrieve the PanelMatch objects
matches_listC3 <- readRDS(paste0(folder_pathC3, save_name, ".rds"))
matches_listC4 <- readRDS(paste0(folder_pathC4, save_name, ".rds"))

# Retrieve the PanelData object
panel_dfC3 <- readRDS("panel_data/int_panelV2.rds")
panel_dfC4 <- readRDS("panel_data/int_panelV3.rds")

estimates_save_nameC3 <- "estimates/with_svc_intV2_con3_"
estimates_save_nameC4 <- "estimates/with_svc_intV3_con4_"

# No Matching
m.out.noneC3 <- matches_listC3$none
m.out.noneC4 <- matches_listC4$none

match_methodC3 <- "CBPS.weight"
match_methodC4 <- "CBPS.weight"

m.out.C3 <- matches_listC3[[match_methodC3]]
m.out.C4 <- matches_listC4[[match_methodC4]]

attr(m.out.noneC3, "outcome") <- "TOT_ASSET"
attr(m.out.noneC3, "outcome.var") <- "TOT_ASSET"
attr(m.out.noneC4, "outcome") <- "TOT_ASSET"
attr(m.out.noneC4, "outcome.var") <- "TOT_ASSET"
attr(m.out.C3, "outcome") <- "TOT_ASSET"
attr(m.out.C3, "outcome.var") <- "TOT_ASSET"
attr(m.out.C4, "outcome") <- "TOT_ASSET"
attr(m.out.C4, "outcome.var") <- "TOT_ASSET"
```

```{r}
# Estimates under no matching
res_no.match.C3 <- PanelEstimate(sets = m.out.noneC3,
                     panel.data = panel_dfC3,
                     se.method = "bootstrap",
                     parallel = TRUE,
                     num.cores = 6,
                     number.iterations = 10000)

res_no.match.C4 <- PanelEstimate(sets = m.out.noneC4,
                     panel.data = panel_dfC4,
                     se.method = "bootstrap",
                     parallel = TRUE,
                     num.cores = 6,
                     number.iterations = 10000)

# Estimates under CBPS Weighting
res.C3 <- PanelEstimate(sets = m.out.C3,
                     panel.data = panel_dfC3,
                     se.method = "bootstrap",
                     parallel = TRUE,
                     num.cores = 6,
                     number.iterations = 10000)

res.C4 <- PanelEstimate(sets = m.out.C4,
                     panel.data = panel_dfC4,
                     se.method = "bootstrap",
                     parallel = TRUE,
                     num.cores = 6,
                     number.iterations = 10000)
```

```{r}
plot(res_no.match.C3, main = "Estimated Effects (LOG ASSETS) - No Matching")
summary(res_no.match.C3)
hist(res_no.match.C3$bootstrapped.estimates) 
# as.data.frame(summary(res_no.match.C3)) |> mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ exp(.x)-1))

plot(res_no.match.C4, main = "Estimated Effects (ASSETS) - No Matching")
summary(res_no.match.C4)
hist(res_no.match.C4$bootstrapped.estimates)

plot(res.C3, main = "Estimated Effects (LOG ASSETS) - CBPS Weighting")
summary(res.C3)
hist(res.C3$bootstrapped.estimates)

plot(res.C4, main = "Estimated Effects (ASSETS) - CBPS Weighting")
summary(res.C4)
hist(res.C4$bootstrapped.estimates)
```


### Config 3 versus Config 4 - With Stratification by SIZE

```{r, message = F}
library(data.table)
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(PanelMatch)
library(ggplot2)
library(writexl)
library(fastDummies)

df <- readRDS("county_long.rds")
df <- df |> 
      group_by(geoid_2010) |>
      mutate(CountyID = as.integer(cur_group_id())) |>
      ungroup()

# outcome_vars <- grep("^REV_", names(df), value = TRUE)
outcome_vars <- c("REV_SIZE.1", "REV_SIZE.2", "REV_SIZE.3", "REV_SIZE.4", "REV_SIZE.5", "REV_SIZE.6")

df <- df |> dplyr::select(all_of(c(c("CountyID", "TAX_YEAR"), outcome_vars))) 

panel_dfC4 <- readRDS("panel_data/int_panelV3.rds")
df <- merge(panel_dfC4, df, by = c("CountyID", "TAX_YEAR"))

df <- as.data.frame(df) |> select(all_of(c(c("CountyID", "TAX_YEAR", "TOT_REV", "treat.FEMA.adj"), outcome_vars)))
panel_dfC4 <- PanelData(panel.data = df,
                      unit.id = "CountyID",
                      time.id = "TAX_YEAR",
                      treatment = "treat.FEMA.adj",
                      outcome = "TOT_REV")

# Log transformations
panel_dfC3 <- panel_dfC4 |> mutate(across(all_of(outcome_vars), ~ if_else(.x < 0, 0, .x)))
panel_dfC3 <- panel_dfC3 |> mutate(across(all_of(outcome_vars), log1p))
rm(df)
```

```{r}
# Set up the folder path and saved object names
L = 3 # lag, options: 1, 3, 5
save_name <- paste0("Lag", L)

folder_pathC3 <- "matches/with_svc/int_panelV2/config3/"
folder_pathC4 <- "matches/with_svc/int_panelV3/config4/"

# Retrieve the PanelMatch objects
matches_listC3 <- readRDS(paste0(folder_pathC3, save_name, ".rds"))
matches_listC4 <- readRDS(paste0(folder_pathC4, save_name, ".rds"))

estimates_save_nameC3 <- "estimates/with_svc_intV2_con3_"
estimates_save_nameC4 <- "estimates/with_svc_intV3_con4_"

match_methodC3 <- "CBPS.weight"
match_methodC4 <- "CBPS.weight"

m.out.C3 <- matches_listC3[[match_methodC3]]
m.out.C4 <- matches_listC4[[match_methodC4]]

res.C3 <- list()
for (x in outcome_vars){
      print(x)
      attr(panel_dfC3, "outcome") <- x
      attr(m.out.C3, "outcome") <- x
      attr(m.out.C3, "outcome.var") <- x
      
      res.C3[[x]] <- PanelEstimate(sets = m.out.C3,
                     panel.data = panel_dfC3,
                     se.method = "bootstrap",
                     parallel = TRUE,
                     num.cores = 6,
                     number.iterations = 10000)
}

for (x in outcome_vars){
      file_name <- paste0("estimates/interference/c3", x, ".png")
      print(file_name)
      png(file_name)
      plot(res.C3[[x]], main = paste0("Estimated Effects (LOG ", x, ") - ", match_methodC3))
      dev.off()
}

file_name <- paste0(estimates_save_nameC3, save_name, ".xlsx")
print(file_name)
estimate_summaries.C3 <- lapply(res.C3, summary)
estimate_summaries.C3 <- lapply(estimate_summaries.C3, as.data.frame)
write_xlsx(estimate_summaries.C3, file_name)

res.C4 <- list()
for (x in outcome_vars){
      print(x)
      attr(panel_dfC4, "outcome") <- x
      attr(m.out.C4, "outcome") <- x
      attr(m.out.C4, "outcome.var") <- x
      
      res.C4[[x]] <- PanelEstimate(sets = m.out.C4,
                     panel.data = panel_dfC4,
                     se.method = "bootstrap",
                     parallel = TRUE,
                     num.cores = 6,
                     number.iterations = 10000)
}

for (x in outcome_vars){
      file_name <- paste0("estimates/interference/c4", x, ".png")
      print(file_name)
      png(file_name)
      plot(res.C4[[x]], main = paste0("Estimated Effects (", x, ") - ", match_methodC4))
      dev.off()
}

file_name <- paste0(estimates_save_nameC4, save_name, ".xlsx")
print(file_name)
estimate_summaries.C4 <- lapply(res.C4, summary)
```
